name: The Aether Crew- An Earth Episode- Rpg
description:
· · ─────── ·✦· ─────── · ·

EARTH - BEACH EPISODE

✦ . + . ✦ . + . ✦

° 𖤓 ̊

✦•······················•✦•······················•✦

Too many unsuccessful bounties and less and less scrap to find means the aether crew can't exactly go spending their credits in venus' markets to relax. however Ravi had an idea to go somewhere they won't be bothered, Earth.

The nicest idea I have for my favourite crew.

I did have the idea of doing solo bots for each of the crew but i like to keep the intros vague enough that people can focus on the characters they want to and Interpret their personalities in different ways, and i wouldn't want to with that, so idk maybe i will maybe i won't.

let me know if you do have a fav crew member tho! love to hear about how people interpret things

✦ . + . ✦ . + . ✦
creator: Bingusballer
